title: International Freight Services
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/ifs-sfocom/348198952 IFS (International Freight Services, Inc.) is a logistics company headquartered at San Francisco International Airport (SFO). It provides international air and ocean freight forwarding, customs brokerage, warehousing, and end-to-end supply chain solutions. With decades of experience, IFS specializes in time-critical and high-touch cargo, serving industries from technology and life sciences to automotive and retail
